Templates › Vehicle Log Book (IRD)

🚐 Vehicle Log Book (IRD)

IRD-compliant vehicle log book for NZ tradies claiming vehicle expenses — track business vs private use for your tax return.

How to use: Record every business trip. IRD may request this to verify your vehicle expense claim. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo
VEHICLE LOG BOOK
Vehicle: Make/Model/Reg
Owner: Business Name
Period: 2026-04-01 to 2026-03-31

IRD requires a log book for at least 90 consecutive days to establish your business use percentage. Keep receipts for all fuel and maintenance.

DateFromToPurposeOdometer StartOdometer EndkmBusiness? Y/N
Total km this period0
Business km0
Business use %0%
Retain this log book and all vehicle expense receipts for 7 years. IRD may audit vehicle expense claims. NZ Tradie Tools — tradietools.nz

🚐 Vehicle Log Book (IRD)

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Record every business trip. IRD may request this to verify your vehicle expense claim.
